_README: Desktop replication manifest. SubjectA is pre-filled with its known paths (edit if your desktop layout differs). For each NEW subject arriving 2026-07-11, copy the SubjectA block, set name/package_dir/recording_dir/elan_dir, and drop the leading underscore keys. Then: python -m multisubject.run_replication multisubject/replication_manifest.template.json  (run once before the cascades to validate packages; again after to score). Convention: baseline = clip C001 (file_index 0); interview file_index f <-> clip C{f+1:03d}; eaf matched on the C### token.

subjects._comment: TEMPLATE — copy this block per new subject, fill the four fields, remove _comment.
subjects.name: SubjectB
